events.title: Manhattan Concert Productions at Carnegie Hall
events.description: The series opens in Stern Auditorium with an evening spanning Mozart, contemporary choral masterworks, and gospel-inspired triumphs. Featuring Young musicians from Suzuki Music Academy and Cesar Chavez Academy, Octavo Series Chorus, and Festival Octavo Series Chorus performing works by Runestad, Vaughan Williams, Mozart, and Richard Smallwood's Total Praise.

events.title: Flamenco Festival 2026
events.description: The annual Flamenco Festival returns for its 25th edition, showcasing a wide range of variations on the Spanish form at a dozen New York venues including New York City Center, Jazz at Lincoln Center, and Joe's Pub. Features over 80 participants from 16 companies including Manuel Liñán, Eva Yerbabuena, Sara Baras, and more.

events.title: Vessel at Hudson Yards Reopening
events.description: The 150-foot-tall honeycomb-shaped structure reopens with daily access. NYC residents can get free Thursday reservations with proof of ID.
